i am against the choice of vocational training over a conventional degree program because it is a waste of time and money and does not provide the same level of education and opportunities. those who choose vocational training are wasting their time and money and are not preparing for a successful career. i believe that a conventional degree program is the best way to prepare for a successful career and to gain the knowledge and skills needed to succeed in life. those who choose vocational training are not doing themselves any favors and are not preparing for a successful future. player
